memoryArtifacts.headline: Inscription on grave of Sir Walter Griffiths, Knight
memoryArtifacts.description:
Here he the Remains of Sir WALTER GRIFFITH, Kt. who departed this life on the 9th day of August, 1481 and 
JANE his first Wife Daughter of Sir Ralph Nevill, by Mary Grandaughter to John of Gaunt, Duke of Lancaster 
In the Chapel also lie the Remains of AGNES, Second Wife of the said Sir Walter, Daughter of Sir Robert Constable of Flamborough and married secondly to Sir Gervase Clifton of Clifton, in the County of Nottingham, Kt. of the Bath She died January the 23rd, 1505.
Leaving Issue by Sir Walter Griffith aforesaid, 
WALTER his Successor made Knt. of the Bath on All-hallows Eve, 1494, at the Creation of Henry 2nd son of Henry VII. Duke of York and Agnes Married to Gervafe Clifton,
of Clifton-in-Nottinghamshire, Knt. of the Bath, Son of Sir Gervase, above mentioned.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gervase Clifton於大約1438年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Robert De Clifton35歲，母親Alice Booth47歲。他於1456年11月7日與Alice Neville在英國諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1484年住在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓。他去世於1491年5月12日在英國諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓享年54歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gervase Clifton于大约1438年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲Robert De Clifton35岁，母亲Alice Booth47岁。他于1456年11月7日与Alice Neville在英国諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1484年住在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓。他去世于1491年5月12日在英国諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓享年54岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gervase Clifton was born about 1438, in Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Robert De Clifton, was 35 and his mother, Alice Booth, was 47. He married Alice Neville on 7 November 1456, in Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom in 1484. He died on 12 May 1491, in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gervase Clifton est né environ 1438, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert De Clifton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Booth, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Alice Neville le 7 novembre 1456, à Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1484. Il est décédé le 12 mai 1491, à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gervase Clifton um 1438 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert De Clifton 35 und seine Mutter Alice Booth 47. Er hat am 7. November 1456 in Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England Alice Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1484 hat er in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb am 12. Mai 1491 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gervase Clifton è nato il circa 1438 nel Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Robert De Clifton, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Alice Booth, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Alice Neville il 7 novembre 1456, nel Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1484. Morì il 12 maggio 1491, nel Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gervase Cliftonが約1438年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert De Cliftonは35歳，母Alice Boothは47歳であった。1456年11月7日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロレストンでAlice Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1484年にはイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンに住んでいた。彼は1491年5月12日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンで54歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gervase Clifton(이)가 대략 1438년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert De Clifton(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Booth(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1456년 11월 7일 영국 노틴그함실르 롤레스턴에서 Alice Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1484년도에 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에서 살았다. 그는 1491년 5월 12일 영국 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gervase Clifton nasceu aproximadamente 1438, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert De Clifton, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice Booth, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Neville em 7 de novembro de 1456, em Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1484. Ele faleceu em 12 de maio de 1491, em Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gervase Clifton родился около 1438 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert De Clifton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Booth, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Neville 7 ноября 1456 г. в местности роллестон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1484 году. Он умер 12 мая 1491 г. в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gervase Clifton nació aproximadamente 1438, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert De Clifton, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alice Booth, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Alice Neville el 7 de noviembre de 1456, en Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1484. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1491, en Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
